trackedFollowups.title: Playwright upload e2e test coverage
trackedFollowups.description: E2E test coverage for upload flow (Uppy resume, interrupt, success, error handling) deferred to Phase 5 pre-prod test infrastructure increment.

trackedFollowups.title: Custom install-prompt UI polish
trackedFollowups.description: Deferred custom PWA install-prompt UI enhancement (candidate: post-launch UX iteration).

trackedFollowups.title: SPA-native album create/edit (vs. Jinja fallback retention)
trackedFollowups.description: RESOLVED TURN 17: Full SPA-native album create/edit workflow delivered as part of Option B Jinja decommission completion.

trackedFollowups.title: Install jsdom for vitest component test execution
trackedFollowups.description: jsdom package missing from node_modules; AlbumCreatePage + AlbumEditPage component specs compiled but not executed. Coordinator attempted `npm install jsdom` but received E401 authentication error (npm not authenticated in automation environment). Deferred to user's authenticated local environment. BLOCKS: CI reliance on vitest before manual installation.

trackedFollowups.title: Wire SPA vitest into CI pipeline
trackedFollowups.description: Integrate vitest (React component tests) into CI/CD pipeline for automated validation on every commit. Currently manual run only (blocked on jsdom installation).

trackedFollowups.title: ADR: Media bridge seam + httpx loopback architecture
trackedFollowups.description: Document architectural decision for be_media_bridge prefix-less seam (POST /album/shared/images before /album/{album_id}/images) and httpx loopback proxy for token exchange. Candidate: Architecture Decision Record (MADR) in docs/planning/adrs/.

trackedFollowups.title: Audit create_share_token for IDOR vulnerability
trackedFollowups.description: create_share_token endpoint remains authenticated (not gated with require_superuser). Identified in Turn 17 review as low-risk but requires IDOR audit: verify share token generation does not allow unprivileged users to generate tokens for albums they don't own. Tracked as TODO in code.

trackedFollowups.title: CSP style-src unsafe-inline removal (residual)
trackedFollowups.description: Full CSP collapse (Turn 17 increment 2) removed transloadit + Uppy CDN and set script-src 'self' only. Residual: style-src still includes unsafe-inline (for dynamic React inline styles). Candidate: explore styled-components or CSS-in-JS with nonce-based CSP for full collapse without unsafe-inline.

trackedFollowups.title: Transactional create_full album endpoint
trackedFollowups.description: During increment 2 implementation, identified: album creation currently requires multiple calls (create_album + create_category + set cover). Candidate: create_full or create_with_initial_data endpoint for atomicity.

trackedFollowups.title: DRY: Align cover-image handling with be_resizer architecture
trackedFollowups.description: New POST /be_album/upload_cover/{id} endpoint duplicates some image validation logic from be_resizer. Candidate: consolidate or use be_resizer pipeline for cover images.

trackedFollowups.title: ADR: Superuser authorization + multi-call create trade-off
trackedFollowups.description: Design decision rationale: why require_superuser gating at endpoint level (vs. group membership checks), and why album creation requires multiple API calls (create + category + cover) vs. single transactional endpoint. Candidate ADR for docs/planning/adrs/.

trackedFollowups.title: CI grep gate: detect ungated be_* mutations
trackedFollowups.description: Preventative CI check: grep backend routers for POST/PATCH/DELETE mutations missing @Depends(require_superuser) or explicit auth guards. Candidate: GitHub Actions step before merge to catch regressions.

frameworkDecision.resolution: User chose Option B — React 18 + Vite + TypeScript served same-origin by FastAPI

phase3CompletionCheckpoint.codingStandards: ESLint + Prettier + ruff + black all passing
phase3CompletionCheckpoint.awaitingUserDecision: Phase 4 PWA (now completed; awaiting deployment decision)

deliverables: CSP 'self' preserved (no unsafe-eval, no CDN loosening)
phase4CompletionCheckpoint.codingStandards: ESLint + Prettier + ruff + black all passing
phase4CompletionCheckpoint.modernizationStatus: COMPLETE — all four goals delivered and validated

impactfulActionGate.commitMessage: feat: modernize app — React SPA, security hardening, upload reliability, PWA
impactfulActionGate.note: Modernization commit pushed to origin/main. All four goals delivered and validated. Production prerequisites pending: apply migrations 0001+0002, enable HTTPS.

jinjaDecommissionCheckpoint.commitMessage: refactor(frontend): decommission Jinja, add SPA-native album create/edit
jinjaDecommissionCheckpoint.scope: complete (all 14 Jinja templates removed, fe_router deleted, jinja2 removed from requirements.txt, csrf.py removed, CSP fully collapsed to single script-src 'self')
jinjaDecommissionCheckpoint.testsPassing: 75 backend pytest + 103 vitest (2 component specs AlbumCreatePage/AlbumEditPage blocked on jsdom environment, not code)
delivered: GROUP A: 7 endpoints gated with @Depends(require_superuser) (create_album, update_album, create_album_folder [GET→POST], be_album.create_category, be_category.create_category, export_album_json, upload_cover)
GROUP A': new hardened POST /be_album/upload_cover/{id} (os.path.basename, reject ./.. paths, extension allowlist, 10MB cap, PIL .verify(), commonpath confinement)

GROUP B: SPA-native AlbumCreatePage + AlbumEditPage React components, apiClient.postForm, albumForm.ts (comma↔pipe), App.tsx routes /app/album/new + /app/album/:id/edit with RequireAuth+RequireSuperuser, converted AlbumGridPage/AlbumDetailPage outbound links to React <Link>

GROUP C: all 14 Jinja templates deleted (album_form.html, album_edit.html, album_category_create.html, album_upload.html + dependencies), fe_router.py deleted, jinja2 removed from requirements.txt, csrf.py deleted, bare /album/new + /album/{album_id}/edit 302 redirects (open-redirect-safe, token preserved), full CSP collapse (single script-src 'self', kept _MEDIA_CSP for /media/*, residual style-src unsafe-inline pending tightening)
deploymentPrerequisites: jsdom installation in local environment for component test execution (coordinator E401 deferred)
Final production validation on deployed app
jinjaDecommissionCheckpoint.note: Full Jinja decommission (both increments) released to origin/main. Commit 3b14f0c. Push 1285948..3b14f0c. Follow-up: install jsdom locally + run the two create/edit component vitest specs before relying on CI.

jinjaDecommissionReleaseCheckpoint.commitMessage: refactor(frontend): decommission Jinja, add SPA-native album create/edit
jinjaDecommissionReleaseCheckpoint.note: Full Jinja decommission (both increments) released to origin/main. Follow-up: install jsdom locally + run the two create/edit component vitest specs before relying on CI.
